controls.title: COSO Principle 1 — Commitment to Integrity and Ethics
controls.description: The entity demonstrates a commitment to integrity and ethical values.

controls.title: Board Independence and Oversight
controls.description: The board of directors demonstrates independence from management and exercises oversight of internal control.

controls.title: Organizational Structures and Reporting Lines
controls.description: Management establishes reporting lines and authority appropriate for objectives.

controls.title: Information Quality and Communication
controls.description: The entity obtains or generates and uses relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal control.

controls.title: Internal Communication of Control Information
controls.description: The entity internally communicates information including objectives and responsibilities for internal control.

controls.title: External Communication
controls.description: The entity communicates with external parties regarding matters affecting internal control functioning.

controls.title: Risk Assessment Objectives
controls.description: The entity specifies objectives with sufficient clarity to enable the identification and assessment of risk.

controls.title: Risk Identification and Analysis
controls.description: The entity identifies risks to the achievement of its objectives across the entity and analyzes risks.

controls.title: Fraud Risk Assessment
controls.description: The entity considers the potential for fraud in assessing risks to the achievement of objectives.

controls.title: Ongoing and Separate Evaluations
controls.description: The entity selects, develops, and performs ongoing and/or separate evaluations to ascertain control deficiencies.

controls.title: Evaluation and Communication of Deficiencies
controls.description: The entity evaluates and communicates internal control deficiencies in a timely manner.

controls.title: Control Selection and Development
controls.description: The entity selects and develops control activities that contribute to the mitigation of risks.

controls.title: Technology General Controls
controls.description: The entity selects and develops general control activities over technology to support the achievement of objectives.

controls.title: Policy Deployment
controls.description: The entity deploys control activities through policies and procedures.

controls.title: Logical Access Security — Registration and Authorization
controls.description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets.

controls.title: Prior to Issuing System Credentials
controls.description: Prior to issuing system credentials and granting system access, the entity registers and authorizes new internal and external users.

controls.title: Role-Based Access and Least Privilege
controls.description: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access to data, software, functions, and other protected information assets based on roles.

controls.title: Restriction of Physical Access
controls.description: The entity restricts physical access to facilities and protected information assets.

controls.title: Logical Access — Termination and Transfers
controls.description: The entity discontinues logical access for terminated personnel and transfers access as required.

controls.title: Security Measures — Network and Transmission
controls.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software.

controls.title: Restriction of Unauthorized Software
controls.description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users.

controls.title: Malware and Unauthorized Software Prevention
controls.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect unauthorized software.

controls.title: System Configuration Baselines
controls.description: To meet its objectives, the entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify changes to configurations.

controls.title: Monitoring for Anomalous Activity
controls.description: The entity monitors system components for anomalous behavior that is indicative of malicious acts.

controls.title: Event Evaluation and Response
controls.description: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they could or have resulted in a failure of the entity to meet its objectives.

controls.title: Incident Response
controls.description: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing defined incident response procedures.

controls.title: Incident Recovery
controls.description: The entity identifies, develops, and implements activities to recover from identified security incidents.

controls.title: Change Management Process
controls.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure.

controls.title: Risk Mitigation — Vendor and Business Partner Management
controls.description: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions.

controls.title: Vendor and Business Partner Risk Management
controls.description: The entity assesses and manages risks associated with vendors and business partners.

controls.title: Availability Policies and Procedures
controls.description: The entity maintains, monitors, and evaluates current processing capacity and use of system components to manage capacity demand.

controls.title: Environmental Protections
controls.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, implements, operates, approves, maintains, and monitors environmental protections.

controls.title: Backup and Recovery
controls.description: The entity tests recovery plan procedures to support the availability of information.

controls.title: Processing Integrity Policies
controls.description: The entity obtains or generates, uses, and communicates relevant, quality information to support the functioning of internal control.

controls.title: System Inputs
controls.description: The entity implements controls over system inputs, including controls over completeness and accuracy.

controls.title: System Processing
controls.description: The entity implements controls over system processing to result in complete, accurate, timely, and authorized processing.

controls.title: System Output
controls.description: The entity implements controls over system output activities.

controls.title: Stored Data Integrity
controls.description: The entity implements controls over the storage of information to meet its objectives related to processing integrity.

controls.title: Confidentiality Policies
controls.description: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.

controls.title: Confidential Information Disposal
controls.description: The entity disposes of confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.

controls.title: Confidential Data Encryption
controls.description: The entity encrypts confidential data at rest and in transit.

controls.title: Confidentiality Breach Response
controls.description: The entity responds to breaches of confidentiality.

controls.title: Privacy Notice
controls.description: The entity provides notice to data subjects about its privacy practices.

controls.title: Choice and Consent
controls.description: The entity communicates choices available regarding the collection, use, retention, disclosure, and disposal of personal information.

controls.title: Collection of Personal Information
controls.description: Personal information is collected consistent with the entity's objectives related to privacy.

controls.title: Explicit Consent for Sensitive Data
controls.description: The entity obtains explicit consent for the collection of sensitive personal information.

controls.title: Use of Personal Information
controls.description: The entity limits the use of personal information to the purposes identified in the privacy notice.

controls.title: Retention of Personal Information
controls.description: The entity retains personal information for no longer than necessary.

controls.title: Disposal of Personal Information
controls.description: The entity disposes of personal information in accordance with retention policies.

controls.title: Access to Personal Information
controls.description: The entity grants data subjects access to their personal information when requested.

controls.title: Correction of Personal Information
controls.description: The entity corrects, amends, or appends personal information based on documented requests.

controls.title: Disclosure to Third Parties
controls.description: Personal information is disclosed to third parties with prior consent of the data subject.

controls.title: Third-Party Privacy Commitments
controls.description: The entity assesses privacy commitments of third parties.

controls.title: Notification of Breaches
controls.description: The entity provides notification of privacy breaches to affected data subjects, regulators, or others.

controls.title: Quality of Personal Information
controls.description: The entity collects and maintains accurate, up-to-date, complete, and relevant personal information.

controls.title: Privacy Compliance Monitoring
controls.description: The entity monitors compliance with its privacy policies and procedures.
